metadata.name: Pre-Columbian Quechua Lexicon
metadata.author: Dogan Balban
metadata.description: Curated Quechua wordlist filtered for likely pre-Columbian origin. Each entry includes gematria value (Balban 2026 phonosemantic system), POS, English gloss, semantic category, and provenance.

phonological: /f/ does not exist in pre-Columbian Quechua
Spanish consonant clusters at word start (tr, pl, pr, etc.)
semantic: Post-contact concepts excluded (cars, computers, modern fauna)
Inflected forms and alternative spellings excluded
etymological: Wiktionary etymology marked Spanish/Castilian/English/Portuguese borrowings excluded
